LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS ALLAN J. KAPLAN AND I/PRO CORPORATION'S DEMURRRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT OF CHRISTOPHER E BUTLER IS OVERRULED, 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. THE COURT MAY NOT CONSIDER THE CONTENT OF INTERROGATORY RESPONSES IN DECIDING THE DEMURRER. THE ALTER EGO ALLEGATIONS ARE SUFFICIENTLY SET FORTH IN PARAGRAPHS 19, 20 AND 22. THE FRAUD ALLEGATIONS IN PARAGRAPH 16 ARE SUFFICIENT. PLAINTIFF'S WAGE CLAIM IS SUFFICIENTLY PLEAD IN PARAGRAPH 31. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: PATRICK J. DISCOVERY 610, DEFENDANT ALLAN KAPLAN AND I/PRO CORPORATION'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO THIRD PARTY RECORDS SUBPOENA IS GRANTED IN PART. THE SUBPOENA IS MODIFIED TO ONLY REQUIRE PRODUCTION OF THOSE PORTIONS OF THE REQUESTED RECORDS THAT REFLECT ANY PRIOR EMPLOYMENT OR OTHER PROFESSIONAL ASSOCIATION WITH DEFENDANTS I/PRO AND / OR ALLAN KAPLAN. ALL REQUESTS FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE CHAN. NOT REPORTED.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - OVERRULED, 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. Notice Of Hearing On Motion 0f Allan J. Kaplan And I/Pro Corporation For Order Compelling Further Responses To Third Party Records Subpoena;Request For Monetary Sanctions;Statement Of Discovery
Off Calendar Oct-02-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Daniel Peshkin, third party/opposing party in Propria Persona

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Allan Kaplan and I/Pro Corporation's motion to compel further responses to third party records subpoena is granted in part. The subpoena is modified to only require production of those portions of the requested records that reflect any prior employment or other professional association with defendants I/PRO and / or Allan Kaplan. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
